name: Healthcare
commonRegulations: Patient data cannot leave the processing environment
All AI-assisted decisions must be auditable
PHI must be de-identified before LLM processing
failureConsequences: Patient harm, regulatory fines up to $1.5M per violation, loss of medical license, malpractice liability

name: Fintech
commonRegulations: Financial advice must carry appropriate disclaimers
Transaction data requires encryption at rest and in transit
Model decisions affecting credit must be explainable
failureConsequences: Financial losses, regulatory penalties, SEC enforcement actions, customer fund mismanagement, loss of banking license

name: Legal
commonRegulations: AI-generated legal content must be reviewed by licensed attorney
Client confidential information cannot be used for model training
Citations must reference real, verifiable cases
failureConsequences: Malpractice suits, bar sanctions, case dismissal, hallucinated case citations (Mata v. Avianca precedent), client harm

name: E-Commerce
commonRegulations: Return/refund policies must be faithfully represented
failureConsequences: Customer churn, refund disputes, FTC enforcement, brand reputation damage, revenue loss from incorrect pricing

name: Enterprise SaaS
commonRegulations: Data residency requirements per customer contract
Audit logging of all AI-assisted actions
failureConsequences: SLA breaches, enterprise contract termination, data breach liability, loss of customer trust, competitive disadvantage

name: Education
commonRegulations: Student data requires parental consent for minors
AI tutoring must not replace qualified instruction
Content must be age-appropriate and bias-free
failureConsequences: Student data exposure, FERPA violations, harmful content exposure to minors, institutional liability, loss of accreditation
